who: medical clinic revenue cycle managers processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For medical clinic revenue cycle managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, frequent billing denials cause cash flow gaps. We provide tracking of denial reasons instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to efficiently track and analyze medical billing denial reasons.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for revenue cycle managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers about billing workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 revenue cycle managers with demo
Engage in community forums for medical billing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of denial reasons for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
